summary: Completed comprehensive testing of admin authentication enhancement. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend admin access control and dashboard functioning properly.

ui_bugs.issue: Registration form input selectors not matching expected patterns
ui_bugs.workaround: API registration works correctly, issue is only with frontend form selectors

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register stores name, email, created_at correctly
POST /api/auth/login returns role=user for other emails
GET /api/admin/users returns all users for admin (11 users)
/admin route redirects to /login when not authenticated
Admin login successful with correct credentials
Admin Dashboard displays correct table with Full Name, Email, Signup Date
Admin Dashboard shows 11 user rows with correct data
No admin link visible in navigation
Normal user redirected from /admin to login (access denied)
